name: v2.5.0
body:
## v2.5.0

• Modern system media notification using AndroidX Media3
• System-generated MediaStyle notification (no custom RemoteViews)
• Large album artwork with dynamic tint/background
• Interactive seek bar with live progress in notification
• Output switcher button on supported devices
• Lock screen and Quick Settings media player support
• Enlarged transport controls on the player screen
• Added favorite toggle in player controls
• Enhanced click-to-play with instant navigation to player
• Removed deprecated volume value pill from player UI
• Removed favorite button from player control bar (kept in MetadataRow)
• Previous button now always skips to previous track instead of restarting
• Bug fixes and performance improvements
changelog:
• Modern system media notification using AndroidX Media3
• System-generated MediaStyle notification (no custom RemoteViews)
• Large album artwork with dynamic tint/background
• Interactive seek bar with live progress in notification
• Output switcher button on supported devices
• Lock screen and Quick Settings media player support
• Enlarged transport controls on the player screen
• Added favorite toggle in player controls
• Enhanced click-to-play with instant navigation to player
• Removed deprecated volume value pill from player UI
• Removed favorite button from player control bar (kept in MetadataRow)
• Previous button now always skips to previous track instead of restarting
• Bug fixes and performance improvements
